Journal.Title: Journal of strength and conditioning research

Article.ArticleTitle: Similar Neuromuscular and Morphological Adaptations Following Short-Term Blood Flow Restriction and Traditional Resistance Training in Young Men.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Kinesiology, Health Promotions and Recreation, College of Education, University of North Texas, Denton, Texas.
